rewrite_verification.notes: IR copy centralized in workplaceApi.ts and wired through SettingsWorkplaceTab.tsx: title (ai_RNbBHYYP), subtitle (ai_RNbBHYYQ), privacy (ai_RNbBHYYT), labels (ai_RNbBHYYW/ai_RNbBHYYZ), placeholders (ai_RNbBHYYX/ai_RNbBHYYa), and button (ai_RNbBHYYb) byte-match drsam-99657.bubble literals. Style refs Group_card_, Text_heading_2_, Text_small_, Text_label_, Input_default_, Button_primary_ applied. workplace upsert failures now surface via workplaceUpsertErrorMessage; ai_RNbBHYYS icon marker present.

criteria_audit.notes: ai_RNbBHYYM panel root; ai_RNbBHYYN info card, ai_RNbBHYYU form, ai_RNbBHYYR privacy notice each carry data-bubble-id markers

Independent Bubble re-read confirms WORKPLACE_NAME_LABEL, WORKPLACE_EMAIL_LABEL, WORKPLACE_NAME_PLACEHOLDER, WORKPLACE_EMAIL_PLACEHOLDER, WORKPLACE_PRIVACY_TEXT, WORKPLACE_CARD_TITLE, WORKPLACE_CARD_SUBTITLE, and WORKPLACE_LINK_BTN_LABEL match IR static copy

linkWorkplace validates form, persists profiles.onboarding_data keys (workplace_name_text, workplace_contact_email_text, workplace_linked_at, workplace_custom_workplace), upserts workplace directory; handleLink on ai_RNbBHYYb with toast and reload

functional_audit.check: Workplace tab renders info card, privacy callout, name/email inputs, and link button (not placeholder shell)
Link button validates required name/email and rejects invalid email before persist
Successful link persists workplace data for current user and reloads form state
Workplace directory upsert surfaces RLS/permission errors when schema present

ui_evidence.notes: Header marker present; React adds Building2 icon but Bubble ai_RNbBHYYO contains only title and subtitle text children
Privacy notice container with border/muted background
Shield icon with data-bubble-id inside ai_RNbBHYYR
Privacy static copy byte-matches drsam-99657.bubble literal for ai_RNbBHYYT
Form group wraps name/email field groups and link button
Text_label_ style_ref; IR copy Organization Name
Input_default_; placeholder Your employer or organization name
Text_label_ style_ref; IR copy Workplace Contact Email
Button_primary_ inside ai_RNbBHYYU; IR copy Link Workplace Account

gaps: Card header (ai_RNbBHYYO) includes a Lucide Building2 icon not present in Bubble element tree (title/subtitle only)
Success/error toast strings are app-authored, not IR static copy

critiques.finding: workplace-card-header (ai_RNbBHYYO) renders a Building2 icon beside title/subtitle, but Bubble ai_RNbBHYYO has only ai_RNbBHYYP and ai_RNbBHYYQ text children — no icon entity.
critiques.alternative: Remove the invented icon or map to an IR icon entity if one exists elsewhere in the workplace card slice.

critiques.finding: workplace_linked_at is persisted in onboarding_data but no longer surfaced in UI after the copy-fix pass removed linkedAt state.
critiques.alternative: Acceptable if Bubble bTIja workflow does not display linked timestamp; otherwise add a read-only linked-on line sourced from loadWorkplaceLink.
